title: The Revolutionaries Hold Their Ground
description: Pages 11–14 focus on the revolutionaries hold their ground, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as sabo confronts the Marines and Fujitora while Luffy's group keeps moving toward the palace and Dressrosa's decisive battle.

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Don't tell me you intend to go after Doflamingo without taking these seasons cuffs off.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't sweat it. It'll all work out! Let's go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Where are you getting this confidence from!? Let's just go back to that plateau! And look for the key!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If we don't win this fight, we're gonna die!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There it is, straw hat! Go inside! We'll protect the entrance!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Keep an eye on the entrance for us! Don't get distracted or anything!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The hell are you guys doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: It's straight to the sunflower fields for us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: The guy that's gonna be the pirate King!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: We're currently at that plateau that I think you two just left from. Where are you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Umm... right now we're on the 1st level of some mountain but we're heading for the sunflower fields!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Sun- flower fields!? That's on the 4th level!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Viola found the keys for Traffy's Handcuffs!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Robin-ya! Hand 'em over! How can we get them from...

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Greetings and Salute- Tions, this is Leo from the Tontatta Tribe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: I'm just about to rush over there with Miss Rebecca, the chicken-human, and Robin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Let's meet up on the 4th level at the sunflower fields!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Ehh!? How are you guys gonna manage to catch up with us!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: We'll explain later! See you at the sunflower fields!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: See, I told you things would work out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: That was all just a coinci- dance, you idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: This is just a slanted well.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Like there'd ever be a secret passage here.

summary: The Revolutionaries Hold Their Ground develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
